graphicsoptionsmenu_atmospherics_desc: Choose the quality of atmospheric effects, such as fog and scattering.
graphicsoptionsmenu_depthoffield_desc: Depth of field simulates a real camera lens by blurring objects that are out of focus.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_enable_desc: NVIDIA DLSS uses AI to boost frame rates while maintaining great image quality and responsiveness. This feature requires a GeForce RTX graphics card.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_fg_enable_desc: Frame Generation boosts frame rates by using AI to render additional frames. This feature requires a GeForce RTX 40 Series graphics card.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_fg_enable_unava: Frame Generation boosts frame rates by using AI to render additional frames. This feature requires a GeForce RTX 40 Series graphics card and requires 'Hardware-accelerated GPU scheduling' to be enabled in OS settings.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_fg_unsupported_: This setting requires a graphics card that supports NVIDIA DLSS Frame Generation.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_sr_quality_desc: Super Resolution boosts frame rates by rendering fewer pixels and using AI to output high resolution frames. This feature requires a GeForce RTX graphics card.
graphicsoptionsmenu_dlss_unsupported_too: This setting requires a graphics card that supports NVIDIA DLSS.
graphicsoptionsmenu_fsr3_fg_desc: AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 3 Frame Generation increases frame rate by creating additional frames computed from existing inputs.
graphicsoptionsmenu_fsr3_quality_desc: AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution 3 combines high-quality image upscaling with frame generation technologies to generate high resolution frames at fast frame rates.
graphicsoptionsmenu_gamma_desc: Adjust the brightness of the darker parts of the screen.
graphicsoptionsmenu_globalillumination_d: Global illumination improves the realism of lighting by taking into account light interactions with surfaces in the environment. For example, shadowed areas can receive indirect light bouncing off of surrounding objects which can reduce the shadow's darkness, just like in the real world.
graphicsoptionsmenu_hdrdesc: High dynamic range (HDR) provides higher image contrast on displays that support it.
graphicsoptionsmenu_hdrifavailable: Enable HDR on supported displays (Requires Restart)
graphicsoptionsmenu_maxanisotropiclevel_: Anisotropic filtering enhances the quality of textures on surfaces that are viewed at an angle.
graphicsoptionsmenu_motionblur_desc: Motion blur adds a directional blur effect to fast-moving objects and camera movements.
graphicsoptionsmenu_rain_desc: Choose the quality of rain particle effects.
graphicsoptionsmenu_raytracedao_unavaila: A graphics card with support for raytracing is required to enable this feature.
graphicsoptionsmenu_raytracedshadows_una: A graphics card with support for raytracing is required to enable this feature.
graphicsoptionsmenu_raytracing_unsupport: This setting requires a graphics card that supports raytracing.
graphicsoptionsmenu_reflex_desc: NVIDIA Reflex reduces system latency and increases PC responsiveness.
graphicsoptionsmenu_reflex_unsupported_t: This setting requires a graphics card that supports NVIDIA Reflex Low Latency.
graphicsoptionsmenu_requires_dlss_toolti: This setting is only available when NVIDIA DLSS is enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_requires_fsr3_toolti: This setting is only available when AMD FSR 3 is enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_restricted_dlss_fg_t: Some options are not available when NVIDIA DLSS Frame Generation is enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_restricted_gi_toolti: Some options are not available when Global Illumination is enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_restricted_sss_toolt: Some options are not available when Screen Space Shadows are enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_screenspaceshadows_d: Screen space shadows makes shadows more detailed, and reduces floating shadows.
graphicsoptionsmenu_temporalupscaleratio: Temporal upscaling increases frame rate by rendering the game at a lower resolution and upscaling the result.
graphicsoptionsmenu_triplebuffering_desc: Triple buffering can, in some cases, provide a more stable frame rate at the cost of higher input lag.
graphicsoptionsmenu_vsync_desc: Enabling VSync synchronises the game's frame rate to the refresh rate of the monitor. VSync can reduce screen tearing but can increase input lag.
graphicsoptionsmenu_vsync_unavailable_dl: Vsync is not available when NVIDIA DLSS Frame Generation is enabled.
graphicsoptionsmenu_wind_desc: Choose the quality of wind effects.
